title: The One Key
description: One keybind to rule them all
body:
# TheOneKey
This mod does nothing on its own. It adds the possibility for other mods to add keybinds to any items and have them do stuff.
I made this because I was tried of having multiple keybinds do different things when holding different items and having to remember which key works with which item.

You can also design a plugin for another mod and then add keybinds to that mods items.
